headlines.text: Amateur armed with ChatGPT solves an Erdős problem

takeaway.text: The Trump administration's dismissal of the NSF oversight board lands on the same day an amateur with no advanced mathematics training solves a 60-year-old Erdős problem using ChatGPT. Both stories are about who controls the infrastructure that produces knowledge — one at the institutional level, one at the individual level.
